name: Su-57 Felon
description: Russia's fifth-generation stealth air superiority fighter featuring supermaneuverability and internal weapons bays. Limited production numbers constrain fleet availability.

specialAbilities.name: Supermaneuverability
specialAbilities.description: Thrust-vectoring engines enable extreme post-stall maneuvers, granting advantage in visual-range dogfights.

specialAbilities.name: Loyal Wingman Controller
specialAbilities.description: Can direct unmanned S-70 Okhotnik drones as cooperative combat wingmen.
